zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick於1412年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可時，她的父親William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick21歲，母親Beatrice Sinclair23歲。她於1439年之前與Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1464年6月5日在蘇格蘭凱特內斯享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick was born in 1412, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, was 21 and her mother, Beatrice Sinclair, was 23. She married Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith before 1439. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 5 June 1464, in Caithness, Scotland, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick est née en 1412, à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Sinclair, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith avant 1439. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 juin 1464, à Caithness, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick 1412 in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick 21 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Sinclair 23. Sie hat vor 1439 Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 5. Juni 1464 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Caithness, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick è nata il nel 1412 nel Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Sinclair, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith prima del 1439. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 5 giugno 1464, nel Caithness, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwickが1412年にスコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックで生まれた時，父William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwickは21歳，母Beatrice Sinclairは23歳であった。1439年以前にSir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1464年6月5日にスコットランドケイスネスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick(이)가 1412년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Sinclair(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1439년 이전 Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 6월 5일 스컷랜드 케이스네스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith antes 1439. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 5 de junho de 1464, em Caithness, Scotland, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick родилась в 1412 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Sinclair, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith перед 1439 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 5 июня 1464 г. в местности цеитнесс, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Sir James Douglas 1st Lord of Dalkeith antes de 1439. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 5 de junio de 1464, en Caithness, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años.
